title: IVR Call Attempt
description: IVR v1 call attempt contract for tracked, evidenced attempts under a program policy.
$comment: Sources: TECH-09 and Phase 8 SRS. Technical failures are not counted as customer no-answer attempts.

attempt_id.description: Canonical attempt id used by scheduler and SIM adapter.

attempt_number.description: Customer-counted attempt number within the resolved call policy.

scheduled_window_expires_at.description: Latest allowed start time for this attempt.

attempt_counted.description: Whether attempt counts toward program max customer attempts.

is_counted_customer_attempt.description: Canonical Phase 8 flag for customer-counted attempts.

technical_retry_allowed.description: Whether a technical retry is allowed without consuming customer attempt quota.

technical_retry_count.description: Number of technical retries linked to this attempt.

no_answer.description: Whether attempt is a valid no-answer signal.

invalid_phone.description: Whether phone is invalid based on resolver/provider evidence.

sim_channel_id.description: SIM channel selected by the internal adapter.

provider_call_id.description: Provider/SIM gateway call id if available.

blocked_reason.description: Reason attempt was blocked by policy, owner revalidation, or admin hold.

policy_version.description: Policy version used for this attempt.

script_version.description: IVR script version played during this attempt.
